CustomObject.label: NEPA GIS Layer
CustomObject.description: Registry of federal ArcGIS FeatureServer layers and REST endpoints queried during NEPA project GIS proximity analysis. Each record defines one layer — add a new record to extend coverage without modifying the Integration Procedure.

fields.label: Service URL
fields.description: Base URL for the ArcGIS FeatureServer or REST endpoint. For standard ArcGIS layers, append /query. For non-ArcGIS endpoints (e.g., EJScreen), the full query URL is built using Query_Template__c.

fields.label: Layer Number
fields.description: ArcGIS layer index appended to Service_URL__c before /query (e.g., 0 → /0/query). Set to -1 for non-ArcGIS endpoints that use Query_Template__c directly.

fields.label: Buffer Miles
fields.description: Proximity buffer radius in miles. The spatial query returns features within this distance of the project centroid.

fields.label: Layer Label
fields.description: Human-readable name written to the protection areas summary (e.g., NWI Wetlands, EPA Superfund NPL Site).

fields.label: Result Key Field
fields.description: Field name in the ArcGIS response features.attributes object used to summarize matches (e.g., WETLAND_TYPE, SITE_NAME, GEN_STAT). Written to the protection areas summary line.

fields.label: Query Template
fields.description: Optional full query URL template for non-ArcGIS endpoints. Use {lat} and {lon} as placeholders. When set, overrides Service_URL__c + Layer_Number__c construction. Example for EJScreen: https://ejscreen.epa.gov/mapper/ejscreenRESTbroker.aspx?latitude={lat}&longitude={lon}&unit=miles&distance=1&f=json

fields.label: Named Credential
fields.description: API name of the Named Credential used for this endpoint (e.g., NEPA_GIS_ArcGIS_FWS). All federal public endpoints use No Authentication credentials.

fields.label: Extraordinary Circumstances Keyword
fields.description: Comma-separated keywords that, if found in the response, trigger the extraordinary-circumstances flag on the IndividualApplication. Example: WETLANDS,FLOODPLAIN triggers for NWI layer.

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Execution order within the loop. Lower numbers execute first. Used to control summary line ordering.

fields.label: Active
fields.description: When false, this layer is skipped by the GIS Proximity IP. Use to disable layers without deleting records.
